vulnerability.reason: Generated describes a different but related sensitivity condition (lack of calibration enabling acceptance of spurious chains) rather than the reference's brittle world models that fail under distribution shift and ignore critical factors.
vulnerability.reference: Brittle world models that fail under distribution shift cause agents to ignore critical causal factors.

dose_response.reason: Both arcs involve overgeneralized causal chains producing harmful outcomes in unseen environments, but the reference's link 'agents ignore critical factors under distribution shift' is replaced by 'unquestioning reliance on uncalibrated causal models,' altering the mechanism.
dose_response.reference: Overgeneralized causal chains in learned world models cause agents to ignore critical factors under distribution shift, which, when operating in unseen environments, results in property damage and reduced societal acceptance.
